title: Squake: Ari's fork
description:
A fork of squake for modern versions of Minecraft with modern movement code.

Introduces Quake style movement to Minecraft
body:
# Squake: Ari's fork

Adds Bunnyhopping and Airstrafing to Minecraft with Quake style movement.
An updated fork of [squeek502](https://modrinth.com/user/squeek502)'s squake.

### Why another squake fork?

I find that many squake forks either lack features such as a keybind to toggle quake movement, broken sharking, or go way too far and [have a network handler for some reason](https://github.com/Tlesis/SquakePlusPlus/blob/main/src/main/java/org/tlesis/squakeplusplus/network/CarpetHelloPacketHandler.java)?? 

This fork attempts to have updated movement code while retaining features and codebase from the original Squake
